title: S.O. 4304(E) Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986

धारा 13 की उप-धारा (1) के खंड (ख) द्व ारा प्र ित्त िजिर्ों का प्रर् ोग करते हु ए , तत्कालीन पर्ाावरण और वन मंत्रालर् , भारत सरकार की अजधसूचना का.आ. संख्र्ा 1174 (अ) तारीख 18 िुलाई, 2007, का जनम्नजलजखत और संिोधन करती हैं, अथाात् :— उि अजधसूचना की सारणी में क्र म संख्र्ा 42,120,121,125 और उससे संबंजधत, प्र जवजिर्ों के स्ट् थान पर क्र मिः जनम्नजलजखत क्र म संख्र्ा और प्र जवजिर्ां रखी िाएंगी, अथाात्:— जनसान िो रू म के पास, पहल- 752101(बजलर्ांटा ),भुवनेश्वर , ओजडिा (i) डॉ. िेबासीस जबस्ट्वाल (ii) डॉ. रेखा नार्क (iii) श्र ी दिगंबर अरुखा 27 नवम्ब र, 2020 से 23 अक्टूबर , 2024 " [फा. सं. क् र्ू -15018/21/2017-सीपीडब्लू ] जिगमेट टकपा, संर्ुि सजचव रटप्पण : मूल अजधसूचना भारत के रािपत्र , असाधारण अजधसूचना संख्र्ा का.आ.1174(अ), तारीख 18, िुलाई, 2007 और अजधसूचना संख्र्ा का.आ. 3744(अ), तारीख 17 अक्टूबर 2019 में अंजतम बार प्र काजित की गई थी। MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th November, 2020 S.O. 4304(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of section 12 and section 13 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), read with rule 10 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, vide number S.O. 1174(E), dated the 18th July, 2007, namely:— In the said notification, in the Table for serial numbers 42, 120,121,125 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely:— (1) (2) (3) (4) “42 M/s Universal Enviro Associates, Plot No. 178, Ramakrishnanagar, Opposite Indian Oil Corporation Limited, Godown, Chengicherla (V). Ghatkesar (M), Ranga Reddy (Dist.), Hyderabad-500039, Telangana (i) Mr. T. Murali Krishna (ii) Mr. Tadikonda Krishna Rao (iii) Mr. Boddupalli Narsaiah 27th November, 2020 to 13rd October, 2024 120 M/s Prakriti Consultants Services, 12, Vishnupuri Church Road Aliganj (Mahanagar Ward), Lucknow-226024, Uttar Pradesh (i) Dr. Divya Misra (ii) Dr. Anshita Rohatgi (iii) Ms. Moumita Majumdar 27th November, 2020 to 23rd October, 2024 121 M/s ABC Techno Labs India Private Limited, ABC Tower No. 400, 13th Street SIDCO, Industrial Estate North Phase, Ambattur, Chennai, TamilNadu-600098 (i) Mr. S. Ravi (ii) Mr. K.G. Swaminathan (iii) Mr. A. Robson Chinnadurai 27th November, 2020 to 13rd October, 2024 125 M/s Kalyani Laboratories Private Limited, Plot No. 78/944, Near Nissan Show Room, Pahal-752101 (Balianta), Bhubaneswar, Odisha (i) Dr. Debasis Biswal (ii) Dr. Rekha Nayak (iii) Mr. Digamber Arukha 27th November, 2020 to 23rd October, 2024” [F. No. Q. 15018/21/2017-CPW] JIGMET TAKPA, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.O. 1174 (E), dated the 18th July, 2007 and was last amended vide notification No. S.O. 3744(E), dated the 17th October 2019. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
